title: medicago × blancheana subsp. bonarotiana
intro: Medicago × blancheana subsp. bonarotiana, also known as the French bean or Bonarot's medic, is a subspecies of perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is rich in isoflavones and saponins, which possess medicinal properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Medicago × blancheana subsp. bonarotiana has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, offering potential health benefits such as reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
